sentence: 法律应当严厉惩治食品造假行为。
pinyin: Fǎlǜ yīngdāng yánlì chéngzhì shípǐn zàojiǎ xíngwéi.
english: The law should harshly punish food adulteration.

sentence: 这种家具表面涂了一层树脂保护漆。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng jiājù biǎomiàn tú le yī céng shùzhī bǎohù qī.
english: The surface of this furniture is coated with a layer of protective resin varnish.

sentence: 这本书用白话写成，老少都能读懂。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū yòng báihuà xiě chéng, lǎoshào dōu néng dú dǒng.
english: This book is written in vernacular language, so both young and old can understand it.

sentence: 他出身低微，却凭努力改变了命运。
pinyin: Tā chūshēn dīwēi, què píng nǔlì gǎibiànle mìngyùn.
english: He came from a humble background but changed his fate through hard work.

sentence: 这款果汁不含任何人工色素。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn guǒzhī bù hán rènhé réngōng sèsù.
english: This fruit juice contains no artificial pigments.
